component.name: Frontend Stack
component.description: sbomify's frontend dependency graph (bun.lock). VEX justifications for High/Critical advisories that cannot be remediated by a version bump.

vulnerabilities.description: Serialize JavaScript is vulnerable to RCE via RegExp.flags and Date.prototype.toISOString() when an attacker-controlled object is passed to serialize(). Fixed in serialize-javascript 7.0.3.

analysis.detail: serialize-javascript is a build-time-only transitive dependency of @rollup/plugin-terser (which pins serialize-javascript ^6.0.1) and workbox-build, used solely to serialize the terser minifier's worker options during `vite build`. It is not bundled into the production browser assets that sbomify ships, so the vulnerable code is not present in the deployed/distributed artifact. The exploit additionally requires serialize() to be called on an attacker-controlled object; the build only serializes sbomify's own trusted terser configuration, so the path is unreachable even at build time. Remediation to 7.0.3 is blocked: 7.x calls crypto.randomUUID() at module load and @rollup/plugin-terser still pins ^6.0.1, so forcing 7.0.3 via an override breaks `vite build`. sbomify will adopt the fix once @rollup/plugin-terser raises its serialize-javascript floor.
